name: GEOFlow 10 Wired Feature
description: A feature-story variant with large type, black-white contrast, and focused article presentation. Preserves GEOFlow frontend data contracts and derives from the NetEase News Inspired base theme.
notes: Generated as a high-level visual variant inspired by WIRED. It does not copy logos, assets, content, or proprietary source code.
Keeps GEOFlow Blade variables, SEO meta fields, JSON-LD schema output, category navigation, article routes, and markdown HTML rendering intact.
Visual differences are concentrated in theme.css and documented in tokens.json for future maintenance.
